steps.title: Interpret x in the function k(x)
steps.content: The function $ k(x) $ models the number of students $ x $ years after the organization's establishment. Here, $ x = 4 $ represents 4 years after the start. The output $ k(4) = 44 $ directly means the estimated number of students at that point.

steps.title: Match the interpretation to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice C states: '...44 students in the organization 4 years after it was established.' This aligns with $ k(4) = 44 $, where the input $ x = 4 $ years directly maps to the described time period. Other choices incorrectly associate 44 students with 0 or 10 years.
